name: Swordfish W/Sun-Dried Tomatoes/Olives/Lemon
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the marinated sun-dried tomatoes with 8 pitted Kalamata olives.
2. Place a lemon slice on the bottom of a baking dish.
3. Lay the swordfish steak on top of the lemon slice.
4. Spread the tomato and olive mixture evenly over the swordfish.
5. Bake for 17 to 20 minutes in a preheated oven at 350°F (175°C).
